case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION;$4616 US CURRENCY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER RELEASING PROPERTY PUR TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1536 AND ORDER TO DEPOSIT MONEY
DECLARATION OF CHLOE T MOSQUEDA RE: CLAIMANT'S CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA LOPEZ, ARMANDO

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,000.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT ARMANDO LOPEZ. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3,616.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISCOVERY 612, NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PET. FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PET. FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES ANDN JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES - OFF CALENDAR AT THE REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY.

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION;$4616 US CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100,INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PET. FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PET. FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES ANDN JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR JAN-23-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 612
